market_pulse: EDC Week afterglow driving peak activity; competitors leveraging artist announce momentum while LIV maintains steady daytime/nighttime operations.

factors: EDC Week residual traffic still flowing to nightlife venues

weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Leverage EDC aftermarket: promote LIV Nightclub table service for Saturday late-night, emphasize after-party positioning, bundle LIV Beach sunrise recovery packages for Sunday AM.

content_gaps.description: Competitors using trending 'summer vibes' audio tracks on TikTok; LIV posts showing outfit/fashion focus but missing sonic branding.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create TikTok series pairing LIV Beach cabana lifestyle with trending summer/party audio; feature staff/VIP reaction clips to boost algorithm reach.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA and Hakkasan posting BTS staff/setup content; LIV mostly promotional. Zero BTS DJ booth setup or server prep content detected.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 'LIV Prepared' series: 1-2min BTS clips of soundcheck, bartender crafting signature cocktails, security briefing. Post Thu/Fri pre-night.

content_gaps.description: Zouk and TAO Beach aggressively promoting early-bird cabana discounts on IG Stories; LIV price positioning unclear in social mentions.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy hourly Story promos Fri 4-10PM and Sat 12-6PM with 'Last Cabana Spots' countdown timer + direct link to doorpass.me booking.
